Our average contribution is just $28. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ea0c/45c30650/15a7e5103/668111b4/1570374/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Candidates often spend the last days of the month jetting from city to city cozying up to wealthy donors and special interests to close their fundraising gaps as quickly and efficiently as possible.

Not Elizabeth. She doesn't host any closed-door fundraisers with wealthy donors. Instead, this weekend she's heading back to New Hampshire, where she'll talk with people in their communities and hold public events to discuss the issues that matter to them.

**Because that 's what our movement is about: the people, through and through.**

**[So when we 're behind on our monthly fundraising goals -- like we are now -- we rely on grassroots donors to fill in the gap. We still need 210 people from Pennsylvania to contribute before the end of the month to hit our goal. Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ea0c/45c30650/15a7e5103/668111b7/1570374/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcyN2VtMS12MS1mdWxsLWMifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190727em1-v1-full-c")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Friend,

---
| 2020 Democrats are floundering. **They heard we raised a RECORD BREAKING $105 MILLION last quarter and they're already dropping like flies.**

But, the**BIG GOVERNMENT SOCIALISTS** like _Sleepy Joe, Crazy Bernie_ and _Pocahontas_ won't go down without a fight. They're firing up their base of **MEGA HOLLYWOOD DONORS** to rescue their campaigns, _which is why I really need you to step up, Friend._

I asked my team pulled your donor file and I'll be honest, I was disappointed to see that you haven't contributed recently. I thought it was a mistake, but take a look for yourself:
**[OFFICIAL DONOR RECORD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=51044d79fefc97fb9791f9fa41e7fb56cd26b83c84a5472141f6fc66ebd10b7a273e48864bc5d7ce1b7cfa5e67eb91488cbe728494483cfe)** **[NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Our _July End-of-Month fundraising deadline_ is coming up and I want to raise $2,000,000 by July 31st at 11:59 PM to finish the month STRONG. Your FIRST contribution is so important, that I've activated **TRIPLE-MATCH** just for YOU.

**[Please make your FIRST contribution by July 31st at 11:59 PM to have your donation TRIPLE-MATCHED and to have your name on the FIRST list I see.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=51044d79fefc97fb4d179f9692e11e67b9cd1daab4b1e17e02a903d9a3f45e32a5a687c81c9b8df21ff07352f2d2f86fffc63f822d1d1640)**

name: Cory Booker
subject: Is your phone on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- Starting in a few minutes, I'm going to be making some calls -- thanking people who donate to our campaign today, as we close in on the critical DNC donor threshold to qualify for the fall debates. [**_If you make a donation right now and get us one step closer to that donor goal, you could be getting one of those calls._**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190728-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190728_CB_20190728-fr-CB-call-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") As you've probably heard in one of the many emails you're getting, the DNC raised the donor threshold to reach the fall debates to 130,000, and I want to hit that number before the next round of debates begins. But the truth is, it's so much more than just a number to me. It represents all of the people out there who put their faith in me and this underdog campaign, who believe in an America where we work together to solve some of our nation's biggest injustices. You are the people who are building this campaign -- not corporate PACs or federal lobbyists or pharma executives. And all I want to do is say thank you. **That 's why I'll be spending time today calling people who've chipped in to help us grow this grassroots campaign. [_Will you be one of them?_](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190728-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190728_CB_20190728-fr-CB-call-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Keep your phone handy -- I may be giving you a ring. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190728-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190728_CB_20190728-fr-CB-call-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") ** ** ** **

But the truth is, it's so much more than just a number to me. It represents all of the people out there who put their faith in me and this underdog campaign, who believe in an America where we work together to solve some of our nation's biggest injustices. You are the people who are building this campaign -- not corporate PACs or federal lobbyists or pharma executives. And all I want to do is say thank you. That 's why I'll be spending time today calling people who've chipped in to help us grow this grassroots campaign. "=" Keep your phone handy -- I may be giving you a ring. Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, "" This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on "", "", and "". It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "". Is this not your preferred email address? subject: Uniquely Qualified
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Yesterday, in Clive, Iowa, I held the first of a series of events we call "Cup of Joe on the Issues,” talking about Iran and national security. You can watch the recording - which was live streamed on Facebook - [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8616908/83658667/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRmMmE5ZC02MWIxLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9Zico_0LEOPFXSGgRg9uM2X5bJdjRwyJTRxx8SIu-w=&v=PZWa4Q0E3Ho&feature=youtu.be).
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8616909/83658669/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRmMmE5ZC02MWIxLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9Zico_0LEOPFXSGgRg9uM2X5bJdjRwyJTRxx8SIu-w=&v=PZWa4Q0E3Ho&feature=youtu.be)
I talked about why saber-rattling in the Middle East is bringing us closer to senseless conflict, the limitations of our military in operating in the region, and why we must return to the Iran nuclear deal. I also fielded questions on China, 5G and "training for a lifetime” of our labor force.
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8616910/83658674/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRmMmE5ZC02MWIxLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9Zico_0LEOPFXSGgRg9uM2X5bJdjRwyJTRxx8SIu-w=&refcode=IssuesEM1)
As a former Navy 3-star Admiral, former White House Director of Defense Policy, Harvard PhD in Political Economy and Government, and former Congressman sitting on the Armed Services Committee, I am uniquely qualified to tackle the challenges we face.
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8616911/83658678/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRmMmE5ZC02MWIxLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9Zico_0LEOPFXSGgRg9uM2X5bJdjRwyJTRxx8SIu-w=&refcode=IssuesEM1)
But I can't best make that case to the nation unless I get on Fall’s Democratic debate stage - and to do that, I need your help. Please contribute, as we must have 130,000 unique donors (even giving as little as one dollar to the campaign).
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8616912/83658684/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRmMmE5ZC02MWIxLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9Zico_0LEOPFXSGgRg9uM2X5bJdjRwyJTRxx8SIu-w=&refcode=IssuesEM1)
Please contribute to help ensure a former Admiral who commanded an aircraft carrier battle group in the Arabian Sea — and coordinated the national security strategy for President Clinton’s Administration in the White House — can make it onto the debate stage!
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8616913/83658689/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRmMmE5ZC02MWIxLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9Zico_0LEOPFXSGgRg9uM2X5bJdjRwyJTRxx8SIu-w=&refcode=IssuesEM1)
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8616914/83658692/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRmMmE5ZC02MWIxLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9Zico_0LEOPFXSGgRg9uM2X5bJdjRwyJTRxx8SIu-w=)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed! | | |
No no no, team. We just checked our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072819_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_**[Help Ed reach our $10,000 goal by donating $10 or more before midnight!](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072819_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
If we don't reach our goal, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're rewriting the rules so big donors can't trade campaign contributions for influence in Washington. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ea3e/45c30650/15b9cdafc/668104e8/673312090/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

We think it's easier to make big change than small change.

It's easier to be passionate about fighting for what we actually believe in and what we actually need. That's why we've got big plans for big, structural change -- like Universal Child Care and Medicare for All -- to finally make our economy work for working families.

And the way we're running our campaign is big, structural change in action. We're not waiting for someone else to change the campaign finance rules or nibbling around the edges. We're saying no to super PACs and Washington lobbyists and donor dinners.

**We decided that the influence of big money in our politics should end right now. And the result? Over one million grassroots contributions are powering this movement.**

| | Do you remember it, Derek?

Two years ago today, in the early hours of the morning, Senate Republicans came within _**one vote**_ of repealing healthcare for millions of Americans.

One vote -- one Senate seat -- was the only thing standing in the way of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump repealing the Affordable Care Act, reversing Medicaid expansion, and ending protections for Americans with pre-existing medical conditions. Had it not been for the late Sen. John McCain's principled stand that night, it all could have gone very, very differently.

We all know where Mark stood that night, and that he's been fighting to protect and expand access to healthcare. It's one of the reasons why President Trump and Republicans in Washington are targeting Mark in 2020. **[Will you chip in today to help Mark build the campaign he'll need to fight back?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1ce/53d9897e/5146e6ed/1c8e7a0c/1878585124/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julyeom?refcode=20190728nd__154__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

They know that because Mark's opponent had a 97.8% pro-Trump voting record in Congress, where he voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Last month, supporters gathered friends and family in living rooms across America, introducing more people to Michael's vision for the future.

name: Tim Ryan [personal]
subject: quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Friend,

I'm taking a quick break from debate prep and wanted to drop you a short note.

**It 's clear our country needs to change direction.** Donald Trump is more interested in scoring political points and making outrageous, offensive comments than leading. His actions divide rather than unite.

I'm running for President because it's time we move from old systems and rebuild a new America that invests in public education, affordable health care and an economy that works for all of us. **An America united by a shared vision for our future.**

Tuesday's debate will be a defining moment in this race. I'll be squaring off against some tough competitors. _But I believe our message of investing in our values so we can focus on what really matters - healing and uniting our nation - will carry the day._

**Friend, I need your support now more than ever. Will you contribute to our campaign today to ensure we have the resources to carry our message from Detroit to communities and cities across America in the days ahead?**

[**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/keepupthefight**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190728_2_2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomkeepupthe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190728_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190728_2_2")

Thank you for your continuing support. It means so much to me to know you're standing with me.

Tim

name: Jim
subject: Thank you
body:
|
---
We had our last fundraising deadline before the primary yesterday and I wanted to reach out to personally thank you.
Friend,

We had our last fundraising deadline before the primary yesterday, and I wanted to reach out to personally thank you. Your support over these last few months has been incredible.

With support from folks like you, we can make our vision for Mississippi a reality. We can make our state government more open and honest, improve our public education system, cut government waste, cut taxes for working folks, and set the right priorities to build a better Mississippi.

Together, we can move our state forward and put the hardworking people of Mississippi first.

Thank you,
Jim

| | When I was growing up, it wasn't expected that the Mexican-American son of a single mother would be destined for public office -- and certainly not serve as a presidential cabinet member. | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce26/3eb3e2fc/5af95120/744a1a70/2543840032/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190728_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")
---

Back then, a Latino had never served as a cabinet secretary. Kids on one side of town were expected to succeed. Kids on the other side were not.

**I defied the odds then, and I need your help to defy the odds now. **

I haven't always been a frontrunner in this race, but I haven't always been a frontrunner in life. And I know that with the support of people like you, we can surpass all expectations.

**So I 'm asking, as someone who knows what it takes to defy the odds, will you chip in $15 to my campaign? **

name: Rob Flaherty, Beto for America
subject: Give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Can I explain what your support buys us? Here’s what we’ve done in July alone:
#
Yesterday we emailed to tell you about July’s average donation: $22.92.
It’s a number we’re really proud of, because it says a lot about how we’ve funded this campaign. Hundreds of thousands of everyday people are stepping up to make it happen.
[In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to donate another $22.92 (or whatever you feel like giving) to our campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21035?refcode=ema20190728-45527&t=1&akid=45527%2E444211%2EyLHmMk) But first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain what a gift like that buys us.
In July alone, your $22.92 contributions allowed us to:
* Bring on four new senior members of our team to lead the campaign’s rapid response, research, political and data operations.
* Open 11(!) field offices in Iowa, 2 offices in South Carolina and a volunteer office in El Paso.
* Build a brand-new “Believe” page on our website, featuring supporters sharing their own stories about why they’re on #TeamBeto.

Of course, the most important thing is that $22.92 buys us a chance to change this country. Each donation gets us one step closer to defeating Donald Trump.
[Can you add a $22.92 contribution? It may not seem like much, but when hundreds of thousands of you all chip in, it really adds up.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21035?refcode=ema20190728-45527&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=45527%2E444211%2EyLHmMk)
**[Contribute $22.92 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21035?refcode=ema20190728-45527&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=45527%2E444211%2EyLHmMk)**
Thank you for helping us run this campaign the right way. All people, no PACs. $22.92 at a time we are building the greatest grassroots campaign this country has ever seen.
It’s an honor being in this with you,
Rob Flaherty
Digital Director
Beto for America

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: The faces of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Every day on the trail, I learn something new about the people of our country. I hear personal stories of loss, hope, setback and victory. Hearing those stories is what keeps me going. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771738/691c9bd/6ed7dc9f/11a45ce2/104063343/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, this is a people-powered campaign that refuses all corporate PAC money--and that's for a reason.

[**_I want our base of support to reflect who this campaign is fighting for --and that's the American people._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190728_JH_20190728-fr-JH-people-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I get to step inside the small businesses that make communities tick, meet their owners, and learn how business is going. I learn what's keeping communities up at night, whether it's worries about health care, paying for a child's college education, or responding to the climate crisis.

**Every day on the trail, I learn something new about the people of our country. I hear personal stories of loss, hope, setback and victory. Hearing those stories is what keeps me going.**

In Detroit, I was honored to participate in important discussions about the future of voting rights at the NAACP Convention. ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190728_JH_20190728-fr-JH-people-all_all_i1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** In Iowa, I did the RAGBRAI (The Des Moines Register's Annual Great Bicycle Ride Across Iowa) with a team of dedicated supporters. Our long-distance rides were interspersed with long, forthright conversations about the concerns of Iowans. Although our steeds were bicycles, it didn't interfere with our collective spirit of Giddy Up! ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190728_JH_20190728-fr-JH-people-all_all_i2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** And in New Hampshire, I did a bit of sparring with a spirited young debate team in Hanover, full of arguments, questions and concerns over the future of our country, from the climate crisis to the burdens of student debt. ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190728_JH_20190728-fr-JH-people-all_all_i3&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** Speaking of debates--mine is on Tuesday. And in order to keep traveling the country and listening to Americans face to face, I'll need your help, both to build our resources and to reach our goal of 130,000 unique supporters.

[**_Will you chip in to help us keep going?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190728_JH_20190728-fr-JH-people-all_all_l2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771738/691c9bd/6ed7dc9f/11a45c10/104063343/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

**—**
When we began this campaign a few months ago, I said that we would start the campaign as we would end it: with gratitude. In that spirit, I want to thank you for the generous support you have given this campaign, in the form of both money and time. I am honored and humbled. In the first full quarter of our campaign, as a first-time candidate, almost a year-and-a half out from the primary election, we raised over $40,000 and grew our campaign community to over 100 volunteers and 200 subscribers! We have momentum. Let’s keep it going. We have been meeting with people in communities all over the district. We are hearing your stories. We are fighting hard to be your megaphone. And, we are not alone: we are part of a movement in this country to get our voices heard at the highest levels on the most crucial issues: Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and fighting the corrupting influence of Big Money in Politics. As you continue to run with us, we will keep you in the loop, so that you can see, firsthand, the impact you are having. To keep up to date, please register in our campaign application at [_app.khalilforcongress.com_](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYNxHGzLzl-2B3YaolQCzrNI7k7TmWPIgs8RNX8rMXO8LJRW_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFlXvvEpEZOb1revOs71Gl5nKUdxraeKnGOWe-2Fo9B-2BrH5p2HY5SkmJqKb35mh3TGVskgmpJBJaI7FgZclw5klehjjkENJ0-2B6yprsggS7mqHy0ux09Orptuh8hm-2BWXfCGSNyT1kmRRgRfuwCYtwe2DXSLcJq-2FpZVkfxC-2BTlAIkvItNHAhNl4uqrx11PYTTUopOHVEw6jBy12fyonR60g4dBDlftFEFi-2Bc14Yt8AQg36-2F25wOUcQ67EcSZwGsiomtrpmYX07O1shxjXvgRyYxn5j52V7KM7SFHHUClVCmAPjJsjHouOIgVKEp1P90OYbfO9M0-2F-2BKtJ8LibGqE2gGfzY1PiySk-2F-2FqV78gNd2HyQ55jnN7wpcTFLf-2B4lAkE8dlcOvMiXYV2ddWk5faopLAgXDhl3xYoDXigcrLxhO8Um1gPW4dPcSRvtMMnOV2-2Fw-2Brw620uLmt9dy5bRGjXKn1JYCDs-2FPKtY1nP427TUYK5jaUYAwU-2BHMV5qgwDyuOkKyalbko3LDPBt9Zt2L2Cz-2FnTJipDKMg8uzon8VBvhvU9YRQApw-3D-3D).
